title: Anchor uses a domain-specific memory index instead of OB1 thoughts
summary: Decides Anchor builds a domain-specific Postgres memory index with real foreign keys instead of reusing OB1's generic thoughts table.
notes: No frontmatter or Status field present; classified ADR via numbered filename + adr/ path + single locked technical decision. locked=false because no explicit Accepted status to confirm lock. No cross-references found in body.
